title: striga asiatica var. humilis
intro: Striga asiatica var. humilis, also known as the dwarf witchweed, is a plant species belonging to the Orobanchaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Striga asiatica var. humilis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be dried and powdered for use in various medicinal concoctions.
